spec_match.rationale: Accurately traverses the live DOM utilizing tree walkers to output processing instruction target/data pairs.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive: enables parsing input dynamically, clicking tree nodes to update property lists, and loading code presets.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent explorer blurb perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now uses a complete escapeHtml helper for PI target/data attributes, tree text, comments, and the clicked-node properties table before writing dynamic innerHTML.

references.rationale: Properly cites the official ChromeStatus tracking link under see also.

design_system.rationale: Neat layout structure placing compact tables, readable gray rows, and underlines.

summary: The previously open ProcessingInstruction escaping and reference issues have been resolved; the page now clears the critique follow-up items.
